pi_items.source: Task description specifies saving the workbook as 'Supply_Chain_Profit_Analysis'. Oracle Analytics Desktop uses the .dva extension for saved projects.
Task description explicitly instructs to set the visualization title to 'Product Profitability by Sub-Category'.
Task description requests to display 'Product Sub Category', 'Profit', and 'Sales'. Analysis of the underlying sample dataset confirms these column headers exist.
Task description outlines these exact conditional rules for the 'Profit' column: < 0 (Red), 0 to < 5000 (Yellow/Amber), and >= 5000 (Green).

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly state the requirements: saving the workbook as 'Supply_Chain_Profit_Analysis.dva', setting the title to 'Product Profitability by Sub-Category', and displaying the 'Product Sub Category', 'Profit', and 'Sales' columns. It also specifies three conditional formatting rules for the 'Profit' column based on values being < 0, between 0 and 5000, and >= 5000, assigning Red, Yellow, and Green colors respectively. These facts and column availability are independently verified against the provided dataset and software capabilities.
